# Feature Request

## What should TinyLocal Tools do?

Describe the feature.

## Why is this useful?

Explain the user problem.

## Local-first check

Does this feature need a backend, database, telemetry, analytics, or external AI
API?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] I am not sure

If yes or unsure, explain why.

## Extra notes

Add sketches, examples, or related links.
